keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Bermuda 0, Honduras 1. Kervin Arriaga (Honduras) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Luis Palma.
Goal!  Bermuda 1, Honduras 1. Zeiko Lewis (Bermuda) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the centre of the goal.
First Half ends, Bermuda 1, Honduras 1.
Second Half begins Bermuda 1, Honduras 1.
Goal!  Bermuda 1, Honduras 2. David Ruíz (Honduras) left footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Luis Palma with a cross.
Goal!  Bermuda 1, Honduras 3. Edwin Rodríguez (Honduras) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Luis Palma with a cross.
Goal!  Bermuda 1, Honduras 4. Luis Vega (Honduras) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal    following a corner.
Substitution, Bermuda. Ne-Jai Tucker replaces Aundè Todd.
Goal!  Bermuda 1, Honduras 5. Andy Najar (Honduras) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Edwin Rodríguez.
Substitution, Bermuda. Jai Bean replaces Kole Hall.
Substitution, Bermuda. Sachiel Ming replaces Kane Crichlow.
Substitution, Honduras. Bryan Róchez replaces Anthony Lozano.
Substitution, Honduras. Marcelo Santos replaces Andy Najar.
Substitution, Honduras. Alexander López replaces Edwin Rodríguez.
Substitution, Honduras. Wesly Decas replaces Luis Palma.
Substitution, Honduras. Francisco Martínez replaces Deybi Flores.
Substitution, Bermuda. Daion Swan-Desilva replaces Zeiko Lewis.
Substitution, Bermuda. Knory Scott replaces Djair Parfitt-Williams.
Roger Lee (Bermuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Bermuda 1, Honduras 6. Bryan Róchez (Honduras) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Alexander López.
Second Half ends, Bermuda 1, Honduras 6.
